title: Expense Policy in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger expense policy in practice judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Expense Policy in Practice is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Expense Policy in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good expense policy in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Expense Policy in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
